content_body:
Available for both hiking & biking, the 5-mile Flat Creek Loop is rated moderately. Part of this trail follows a creek as it tumbles down along an old roadbed. The numerous rocks and crossings will challenge your technical riding skill. This loop configuration is the favorite of locals; the ride is great in either direction. Tread: 5.4 miles on singletrack, some distances on an old roadbed.

Click Here for Additional Trail Information
title: Flat Creek Loop
